name: WMI Lateral Movement
description: Detects WMI being used for lateral movement between systems
query:
// WMI Lateral Movement
// Remote WMI execution
events from endpoint
where process_name = "wmic.exe" and command_line contains "/node:"
  or (process_name = "wmiprvse.exe" and event_type = "remote_connection")
group by source_hostname, target_hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 300 seconds
